name: Chicken and Rice Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop fresh parsley.
2. Dredge chicken pieces in flour.
3. In a skillet, heat oil on medium and brown chicken on all sides.
4. Combine rice, poultry seasoning, salt, pepper, milk, and water in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
5. Pour the mixture into the pan and top with chicken.
6. Cover tightly with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 55 minutes or until rice and chicken are tender.
7. Sprinkle with parsley before serving.
Serves: 4
